name: qonto-matchmaker

interface.longDescription: Finds missing Qonto receipts. With attachment-capable email, Claude Code and Codex match and upload approved PDFs; Cowork validates files for manual upload.
capabilities: Match PDFs when attachment bytes are available
defaultPrompt: Reconcile my Qonto invoices for this month

description: Finds missing Qonto receipts. With attachment-capable email, Claude Code and Codex match and upload approved PDFs; Cowork validates files for manual upload.
